data.title: Global Connectivity
data.description: Facilitating communication across borders without barriers.
data.technical_spec: Support for multiple languages and cross-border messaging standards.

data.title: User Privacy Commitment
data.description: Maintaining trust through strong privacy protocols and transparent policies.
data.technical_spec: Robust encryption and transparent user agreements.

data.title: Simplicity and Universality
data.description: Focused on a simple user interface accessible to a wide range of demographics.
data.technical_spec: Minimalistic design keeping user interactions straightforward.

data.title: Reliability
data.description: Ensuring reliable message delivery regardless of network conditions.
data.technical_spec: Network optimization algorithms to ensure message delivery in low bandwidth.

data.title: Commitment to Free Services
data.description: Offering essential communication services without cost to users.
data.technical_spec: No ads policy, relying on Facebook ecosystem's financial backing.
